demo.title: audio.sh
demo.code:
# Dry-run first — needs no key, prints the exact Replicate request
node audio.mjs --op sfx --text "heavy wooden door creaking open" --duration 4 --dry-run

# Text-to-speech — bring your own Replicate key
REPLICATE_API_TOKEN=r8_xxx node audio.mjs \
  --op tts --text "Welcome, traveler." --out out/line.mp3

# Music / ambience and sound effects
REPLICATE_API_TOKEN=r8_xxx node audio.mjs --op music --text "calm lo-fi tavern loop" --duration 20 --out out/tavern.wav
REPLICATE_API_TOKEN=r8_xxx node audio.mjs --op sfx --text "heavy wooden door creaking open" --duration 4 --out out/door.wav

setup: Node 18+ — uses built-in fetch, zero dependencies (no npm install)
Bring your own Replicate API token: export REPLICATE_API_TOKEN (get one at https://replicate.com/account/api-tokens). Generation is billed to your Replicate account, not MythosForge.
Three ops: tts | music | sfx. tts default voice is a MiniMax system voice (--voice to change). Verify with `--dry-run` (needs no key) first.
